# services.squid

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.squid`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.squid.configText` | `null or strings concatenated with "\n"` | Verbatim contents of squid.conf. If null (default), use the autogenerated file from NixOS instead. |
| `services.squid.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to run squid web proxy. |
| `services.squid.extraConfig` | `strings concatenated with "\n"` | Squid configuration. Contents will be added verbatim to the configuration file. |
| `services.squid.package` | `package` | The squid package to use. |
| `services.squid.proxyAddress` | `null or string` | IP address on which squid will listen. |
| `services.squid.proxyPort` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | TCP port on which squid will listen. |
| `services.squid.validateConfig` | `boolean` | Validate config syntax. |
